title: White House to pay TotalEnergies $1 billion to kill off East Coast wind farm projects
summary_full: The announcement comes as the Iran war disrupts global oil and gas supplies, making the U.S.' development of its LNG resources more urgent.
summary_public: The announcement comes as the Iran war disrupts global oil and gas supplies, making the U.S.' development of its LNG resources more urgent.
